name: hyper-skills
description: Marketplace for the hyper-skills Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: hyper-skills-creator
plugins.description: Interactive skill matchmaker for coding agents: find an existing skill or plugin that fits the user's need, then adopt it as-is or personalize it to their taste, level, and workflow. A hyper-skills-creator entry skill routes broad requests and composes two sub-skills — finding-skills (search + narrow + adopt) and personalizing-skills (tune + verify).
